statement.en: Low-Complexity Vertex Optimization for G-PCC Trisoup Geometry Compression

proposer: Kai Yao, Leisong Gao, Wei Zhang et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-indexed or speculative venue) proposing a technical optimization method for G-PCC (geometric point cloud compression) geometry. The core claim—that low-complexity vertex optimization improves trisoup compression efficiency—is engineering-viable but requires peer validation, benchmarking against baselines, and reproducibility confirmation. Without published results, ablation studies, or acceptance at established venue, the axiom remains provisional rather than TRUE.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 頂点の複雑さと幾何の忠実度が、不思議な調和の中で競い合う。
